data.description:

Pearl Gull Iron Ltd ( (AU:PLG) ) has shared an announcement.

Pearl Gull Iron Ltd has announced the key dates for its 2025 Annual General Meeting, scheduled for November 5, 2025, in Subiaco, Western Australia. A significant agenda item will be the election of directors, with nominations closing on September 16, 2025. This meeting is a crucial event for stakeholders as it will shape the company’s leadership and potentially influence its strategic direction.

More about Pearl Gull Iron Ltd

Pearl Gull Iron Ltd is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing on iron ore projects. The company is involved in developing projects such as Switch Pit and Magazine Pit, and is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange under the code PLG.

data.title: TRYT Inc. Announces Reverse Share Split and Delisting
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

TRYT Inc. ( (JP:9164) ) just unveiled an update.

TRYT Inc. announced the approval of a reverse share split and amendments to its Articles of Incorporation, leading to the delisting of its shares from the Tokyo Stock Exchange’s Growth Market. The reverse share split will consolidate 20,000,000 shares into one, reducing the total issued shares to five, which will result in the shares being delisted by September 24, 2025, impacting shareholders as the shares will no longer be publicly traded.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9164) stock is a Hold with a Yen942.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on TRYT Inc. stock, see the JP:9164 Stock Forecast page.

Encounter Resources Limited has announced the issuance of 500,000 new shares following the exercise of unlisted options. data.title: SPARX Group Achieves Record-High AUM, Eyes Further Growth
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Sparx Group Co ( (JP:8739) ) just unveiled an announcement.

SPARX Group Co., Ltd. announced a record-high Assets Under Management (AUM) of JPY 2.057 trillion as of August 2025, marking a significant milestone in the company’s history. This achievement reflects the company’s strategic expansion into alternative investments and its focus on four core areas: Japanese equity, OneAsia, real assets, and private equity. The favorable market conditions, coupled with government initiatives and policies, support SPARX’s continued growth and ambition to become the most trusted and respected investment company globally.

More about Sparx Group Co

SPARX Group Co., Ltd. is a leading independent investment company in Japan, founded in 1989. The company specializes in a diverse range of investment strategies, including Japanese equity, OneAsia, real assets, and private equity. SPARX has strategically expanded into alternative investments, enhancing the stability and resilience of its business portfolio.

data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

The latest update is out from Atlantic Lithium ( (GB:ALL) ).

Atlantic Lithium Limited has announced a proposed issue of securities, including 10 million warrants expiring in 2030 and over 332 million ordinary fully paid shares. This move is part of a placement or other type of issue, with the proposed issue date set for October 27, 2025. The announcement could potentially enhance the company’s financial position, enabling further investment in its lithium projects, which are vital for its strategic growth in the lithium market.

More about Atlantic Lithium

Atlantic Lithium Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of lithium resources. The company is primarily engaged in producing lithium, a key component for batteries, which is crucial for the growing electric vehicle and renewable energy markets.
